case.title: MOBILE & O R. CO. v. GREENWALD & CHAMPENOIS

opinion.h: MOBILE & O R. CO. v. GREENWALD & CHAMPENOIS, 235 U.S. 717 (1914)
MOBILE & OHIO RAILROAD COMPANY, Plaintiff in Error, v. GREENWALD & CHAMPENOIS, a Partnership, etc. No. 207.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. L. E. Jeffiries and S. R. Prince for plaintiff in error.
No appearance for defendant in error.
Dismissed pursuant to the Twenty-eighth Rule.
